languages.text: Upon taking lethal damage, Trazyn will enter recovery, becoming invulnerable and unable to act. At the end of his next turn he will restore {uip|HP|62d234165d134aa29dc521ee3883ef95}% hp, remove all negative effects from himself and become vulnerable again. Trazyn has 2 charges of this ability.

traits.locale_text: Upon taking lethal damage, Trazyn will enter recovery, becoming invulnerable and unable to act. At the end of his next turn he will restore {uip|HP|62d234165d134aa29dc521ee3883ef95}% hp, remove all negative effects from himself and become vulnerable again. Trazyn has 2 charges of this ability.

languages.text: When Trazyn suffers lethal damage, he enters recovery mode. In this mode, he cannot be damaged and cannot act. At the end of his next {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, he regains {uip|HP|62d234165d134aa29dc521ee3883ef95}% {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g}, removes all {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}negative effects{/g} from himself, and can be damaged again. This ability may be triggered twice per combat.
languages.original_text: Upon taking lethal damage, Trazyn will enter recovery, becoming invulnerable and unable to act. At the end of his next turn he will restore {uip|HP|62d234165d134aa29dc521ee3883ef95}% hp, remove all negative effects from himself and become vulnerable again. Trazyn has 2 charges of this ability.

traits.locale_text: When Trazyn suffers lethal damage, he enters recovery mode. In this mode, he cannot be damaged and cannot act. At the end of his next turn, he regains full wounds, removes all negative effects from himself, and can be damaged again. This ability may be triggered twice per combat.

When Trazyn suffers lethal damage, he enters recovery mode. In this mode, he cannot be damaged and cannot act. At the end of his next {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, he regains {uip|HP|62d234165d134aa29dc521ee3883ef95}% {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g}, removes all {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}negative effects{/g} from himself, and can be damaged again. This ability may be triggered twice per combat.

When Trazyn suffers lethal damage, he enters recovery mode. In this mode, he cannot be damaged and cannot act. At the end of his next turn, he regains full wounds, removes all negative effects from himself, and can be damaged again. This ability may be triggered twice per combat.

When Trazyn suffers {g|Encyclopedia:Lethality}lethal{/g} damage, he enters recovery mode. In this mode, he cannot be damaged and cannot act. At the end of his next {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, he regains full {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g}, removes all {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}negative effects{/g} from himself, and can be damaged again. This ability may be triggered twice per combat.

languages.text: Когда Тразин получает летальный урон, он переходит в режим восстановления. В этом режиме он не может получать урон и совершать действия. В конце своего следующего {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}хода{/g} он восстанавливает {uip|HP|62d234165d134aa29dc521ee3883ef95}% {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}здоровья{/g}, снимает с себя все {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}негативные эффекты{/g} и снова может получать урон. Эта способность может сработать дважды за бой.
languages.original_text: When Trazyn suffers lethal damage, he enters recovery mode. In this mode, he cannot be damaged and cannot act. At the end of his next {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, he regains {uip|HP|62d234165d134aa29dc521ee3883ef95}% {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g}, removes all {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}negative effects{/g} from himself, and can be damaged again. This ability may be triggered twice per combat.

traits.locale_text: Когда Тразин получает летальный урон, он переходит в режим восстановления. В этом режиме он не может получать урон и совершать действия. В конце своего следующего {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}хода{/g} он полностью восстанавливает {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}здоровье{/g}, снимает с себя все {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}негативные эффекты{/g} и снова может получать урон. Эта способность может сработать дважды за бой.

Когда Тразин получает летальный урон, он переходит в режим восстановления. В этом режиме он не может получать урон и совершать действия. В конце своего следующего {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}хода{/g} он полностью восстанавливает {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}здоровье{/g}, снимает с себя все {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}негативные эффекты{/g} и снова может получать урон. Эта способность может сработать дважды за бой.

languages.text: Lorsque Trazyn subit des dégâts mortels, il passe en mode récupération et ne peut plus ni agir ni subir de dégâts. À la fin de son prochain {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}tour{/g}, il récupère {uip|HP|62d234165d134aa29dc521ee3883ef95} % de ses {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}blessures{/g}, dissipe tous les {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}effets négatifs{/g} qui l'affectent et peut de nouveau subir des dégâts. Cette capacité peut être déclenchée deux fois par combat.
languages.original_text: When Trazyn suffers lethal damage, he enters recovery mode. In this mode, he cannot be damaged and cannot act. At the end of his next {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, he regains {uip|HP|62d234165d134aa29dc521ee3883ef95}% {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g}, removes all {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}negative effects{/g} from himself, and can be damaged again. This ability may be triggered twice per combat.

traits.locale_text: Lorsque Trazyn subit des dégâts mortels, il passe en mode récupération et ne peut plus ni agir ni subir de dégâts. À la fin de son prochain {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}tour{/g}, il récupère {uip|HP|62d234165d134aa29dc521ee3883ef95} % de ses {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}blessures{/g}, dissipe tous les {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}effets négatifs{/g} qui l'affectent et peut de nouveau subir des dégâts. Cette capacité peut être déclenchée deux fois par combat.

Lorsque Trazyn subit des dégâts mortels, il passe en mode convalescence et ne peut plus ni agir ni subir de dégâts. À la fin de son prochain {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}tour{/g}, il récupère la totalité de ses {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}blessures{/g}, dissipe tous les {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}effets négatifs{/g} qui l'affectent et peut de nouveau subir des dégâts. Cette capacité peut être déclenchée deux fois par combat.

languages.text: Trazyn, ölümcül hasara maruz kaldığında toparlanma moduna girer. Bu moddayken hasar almaz ve eylemde bulunamaz. Bir sonraki {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turunun{/g} sonunda %{uip|HP|62d234165d134aa29dc521ee3883ef95} {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}sağlık{/g} puanını geri kazanır, üzerindeki tüm {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}olumsuz etkilerden{/g} kurtulur ve tekrar hasar alabilir hâle gelir. Bu kabiliyet her çatışmada iki kez tetiklenebilir.
languages.original_text: When Trazyn suffers lethal damage, he enters recovery mode. In this mode, he cannot be damaged and cannot act. At the end of his next {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, he regains {uip|HP|62d234165d134aa29dc521ee3883ef95}% {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g}, removes all {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}negative effects{/g} from himself, and can be damaged again. This ability may be triggered twice per combat.

traits.locale_text: Trazyn, ölümcül hasara maruz kaldığında toparlanma moduna girer. Bu moddayken hasar almaz ve eylemde bulunamaz. Bir sonraki {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turunun{/g} sonunda %{uip|HP|62d234165d134aa29dc521ee3883ef95} {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}sağlık{/g} puanını geri kazanır, üzerindeki tüm {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}olumsuz etkilerden{/g} kurtulur ve tekrar hasar alabilir hâle gelir. Bu kabiliyet her çatışmada iki kez tetiklenebilir.

Trazyn, {g|Encyclopedia:Lethality}ölümcül{/g} hasara maruz kaldığında toparlanma moduna girer. Bu moddayken hasar almaz ve eylemde bulunamaz. Bir sonraki {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turunun{/g} sonunda {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}sağlık{/g} puanlarının tamamını geri kazanır, üzerindeki tüm {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}olumsuz etkilerden{/g} kurtulur ve tekrar hasar alabilir hâle gelir. Bu kabiliyet her çatışmada iki kez tetiklenebilir.

languages.text: 特拉金受到致命伤害后会进入复苏模式。此模式下他无法受到伤害，也无法行动。在其下个{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}回合{/g}结束时，特拉金恢复{uip|HP|62d234165d134aa29dc521ee3883ef95}%{g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}生命值{/g}，移除自身所有{g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}负面效果{/g}，并可以重新受到伤害。此能力每场战斗可触发两次。
languages.original_text: When Trazyn suffers lethal damage, he enters recovery mode. In this mode, he cannot be damaged and cannot act. At the end of his next {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, he regains {uip|HP|62d234165d134aa29dc521ee3883ef95}% {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g}, removes all {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}negative effects{/g} from himself, and can be damaged again. This ability may be triggered twice per combat.

traits.locale_text: 特拉金受到致命伤害后会进入复苏模式。此模式下他无法受到伤害，也无法行动。在其下个{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}回合{/g}结束时，特拉金恢复{uip|HP|62d234165d134aa29dc521ee3883ef95}%{g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}生命值{/g}，移除自身所有{g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}负面效果{/g}，并可以重新受到伤害。此能力每场战斗可触发两次。

languages.text: Cuando Trazyn sufre daño letal, entra en modo de recuperación. En este modo no puede ser dañado ni tampoco puede actuar. Al final de su próximo {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turno{/g}, recupera un {uip|HP|62d234165d134aa29dc521ee3883ef95} % de sus {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}heridas{/g}, se eliminan todos los {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}efectos negativos{/g} que sufre y vuelve a ser vulnerable al daño. Esta capacidad puede activarse dos veces por combate.
languages.original_text: When Trazyn suffers lethal damage, he enters recovery mode. In this mode, he cannot be damaged and cannot act. At the end of his next {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, he regains {uip|HP|62d234165d134aa29dc521ee3883ef95}% {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g}, removes all {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}negative effects{/g} from himself, and can be damaged again. This ability may be triggered twice per combat.

traits.locale_text: Cuando Trazyn sufre daño letal, entra en modo de recuperación. En este modo no puede ser dañado ni tampoco puede actuar. Al final de su próximo {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turno{/g}, recupera un {uip|HP|62d234165d134aa29dc521ee3883ef95} % de sus {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}heridas{/g}, se eliminan todos los {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}efectos negativos{/g} que sufre y vuelve a ser vulnerable al daño. Esta capacidad puede activarse dos veces por combate.

Cuando Trazyn sufre daño letal, entra en modo de recuperación. En este modo no puede ser dañado ni tampoco puede actuar. Al final de su próximo {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turno{/g}, recupera todas sus {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}heridas{/g}, se eliminan todos los {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}efectos negativos{/g} que sufre y vuelve a ser vulnerable al daño. Esta capacidad puede activarse dos veces por combate.

languages.text: Erleidet Trazyn tödlichen Schaden, wechselt er in den Regenerationsmodus. In diesem Modus kann er nicht verletzt werden und nicht agieren. Am Ende seines nächsten {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}Zuges{/g} regeneriert er {uip|HP|62d234165d134aa29dc521ee3883ef95} % {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}Wunden{/g}, befreit sich von allen {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}negativen Effekten{/g} und kann wieder Schaden erleiden. Diese Fähigkeit kann pro Kampf zweimal ausgelöst werden.
languages.original_text: When Trazyn suffers lethal damage, he enters recovery mode. In this mode, he cannot be damaged and cannot act. At the end of his next {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, he regains {uip|HP|62d234165d134aa29dc521ee3883ef95}% {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g}, removes all {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}negative effects{/g} from himself, and can be damaged again. This ability may be triggered twice per combat.

traits.locale_text: Erleidet Trazyn tödlichen Schaden, wechselt er in den Regenerationsmodus. In diesem Modus kann er nicht verletzt werden und nicht agieren. Am Ende seines nächsten {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}Zuges{/g} regeneriert er {uip|HP|62d234165d134aa29dc521ee3883ef95} % {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}Wunden{/g}, befreit sich von allen {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}negativen Effekten{/g} und kann wieder Schaden erleiden. Diese Fähigkeit kann pro Kampf zweimal ausgelöst werden.

Erleidet Trazyn tödlichen Schaden, wechselt er in den Regenerationsmodus. In diesem Modus kann er nicht beschädigt werden und nicht agieren. Am Ende seines nächsten {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}Zuges{/g} regeneriert er sämtliche {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}Wunden{/g}, befreit sich von allen {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}negativen Effekten{/g} und kann wieder Schaden erleiden. Diese Fähigkeit kann pro Kampf zweimal ausgelöst werden.

languages.text: トラズンが致死ダメージを受ける時、回復モードに入る。このモードではダメージを受けたり行動を取ったりできない。次の{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}ターン{/g}終了時に、トラズンは{uip|HP|62d234165d134aa29dc521ee3883ef95}%の{g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}傷{/g}を回復し、自身から全ての{g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}負の効果{/g}を消去し、ダメージを受けられるようになる。この能力は戦闘中に2回まで発動できる。
languages.original_text: When Trazyn suffers lethal damage, he enters recovery mode. In this mode, he cannot be damaged and cannot act. At the end of his next {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, he regains {uip|HP|62d234165d134aa29dc521ee3883ef95}% {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g}, removes all {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}negative effects{/g} from himself, and can be damaged again. This ability may be triggered twice per combat.

traits.locale_text: トラズンが致死ダメージを受ける時、回復モードに入る。このモードではダメージを受けたり行動を取ったりできない。次の{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}ターン{/g}終了時に、トラズンは{uip|HP|62d234165d134aa29dc521ee3883ef95}%の{g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}傷{/g}を回復し、自身から全ての{g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}負の効果{/g}を消去し、ダメージを受けられるようになる。この能力は戦闘中に2回まで発動できる。
